English_NIV_Equivalent: Jesus said, "I am with you for only a short time, and then I am going to the one who sent me.

Oku_Text: Le lòó ke ye lu ge ghel esakene ke ge ab lu Vi we Feyine nè Yiosen-a?

Oku_Text: Əbghaake a Feyine yensen e wene mam.
English_NIV_Equivalent: and God is glorified in him.

Oku_Text: Ka Wanwele neeyen kenəə ke ke koksen Feyin lu ken gher-ghre ka Feyine necy kenǝǝ ke ke kokse Wanwel, ne ǝb shi ken se nɛɛy.
English_NIV_Equivalent: If God is glorified in him, God will glorify the Son in himself, and will glorify him at once.

Oku_Text: Ghon ghine, me bo beey se ye lu ghesen ken se feleenese ǝbliy.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'My children, I will be with you only a little longer.

Oku_Text: Ghene nêy yese è ye kerje me, ne me suuy se ghen ka me nè suuyen se ghé mbiye na ghele Juus ge: Ghaa me nduun lu ne lòó ghen jia gwiy.
English_NIV_Equivalent: You will look for me, and just as I told the Jews, so I tell you now: Where I am going, you cannot come.

Oku_Text: Me me se foo nchil eyfer se ghen ge: Ghen yɛ koje ngeŋ a sen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'A new command I give you: Love one another.

Oku_Text: Ken ka me korjen ghen, lu ken ghee-ghee ka ghene ye kone ngen sen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: As I have loved you, so you must love one another.

Oku_Text: Ghen lòò è ye koje ngen a sen, é wel ǝbjim me ye ke ge ghen lu ghon-eyfel na me.
English_NIV_Equivalent: By this everyone will know that you are my disciples, if you love one another.'

Oku_Text: Simon Bita me bif ge: Wè nduu ghááye Báàba?
English_NIV_Equivalent: Simon Peter asked him, 'Lord, where are you going?'

Oku_Text: Jesus fise ge: Me nduu & kelik ne lòó wè jia ndu fo e leenen, dî ne wè ney jumte gwiy nè me ne lu se ɛybam.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Jesus replied, 'Where I am going, you cannot follow now, but you will follow later.'

Oku_Text: Bita bif ge: Báàba, lu bek ghe we lòó me jia jumte we e leenen?
English_NIV_Equivalent: Peter asked, 'Lord, why can't I follow you now?

Oku_Text: Με lu kebaaten se kuo bek wè.
English_NIV_Equivalent: I will lay down my life for you.'

Oku_Text: Jesus fise ge: Wè le loote lu kebaaten se kuo bek me-a?
English_NIV_Equivalent: Then Jesus answered, 'Will you really lay down your life for me?

Oku_Text: Me suuy ǝbluuy se wè ge: Lumngvəə nëy ye ghan ge yi ton ne wè maamen me kan etal.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Very truly I tell you, before the rooster crows, you will disown me three times!'

Oku_Text: Jesus suuy se ghene ge: Ghàà cytem ə yene ye foo ngek.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'Do not let your hearts be troubled.

Oku_Text: Ghen fó eytem se Feyine, è fo sey se me.
English_NIV_Equivalent: You believe in God; believe also in me.

Oku_Text: ǝblik əbchiine lu & Ba a wome ndaa se eydio;
English_NIV_Equivalent: My Father’s house has many rooms;

Oku_Text: ke le kè wiy di fene me ke suuye ge me nduu se siyse kelik se ghen-a?
English_NIV_Equivalent: if that were not so, would I have told you that I am going there to prepare a place for you?

Oku_Text: É nêy loo lu ne me ndumen è siyse kelik se ghen, é me kase gwiy è lie ghen é ghesen ye lu ka ghene ye lu ghaa me luun.
English_NIV_Equivalent: And if I go and prepare a place for you, I will come back and take you to be with me that you also may be where I am.

Oku_Text: Ghen ke jii ye ey nduun e kelik ke me nduun e ten.
English_NIV_Equivalent: You know the way to the place where I am going.'

Oku_Text: Ntomas me suuy se wen ge: Báàba, ghese báà se ke ghaa wè nduun, lòó ghes keele leɛy jii ye ey nduun gho?
English_NIV_Equivalent: Thomas said to him, 'Lord, we don’t know where you are going, so how can we know the way?'

Oku_Text: Jesus fise ge: Lu me jii, ne lu me ǝbluuy, ne lu me cychii:
English_NIV_Equivalent: Jesus answered, 'I am the way and the truth and the life.

Oku_Text: Lòó wel jia ndu se Bay buu ge ǝb bèè me.
English_NIV_Equivalent: No one comes to the Father except through me.

Oku_Text: ǝb gese suuy se ghene ge: Ghen ke me fene ghen se ke Bay.
English_NIV_Equivalent: If you really know me, you will know my Father as well.

Oku_Text: Se kèètè e leenen lu ne ghene keelemen wen è gese se yene wen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: From now on, you do know him and have seen him.'

Oku_Text: Filib suuy se wen ge: Báàba, dine Bay se ghes, ghey ken kenǝǝ ke ghese shiin.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Philip said, 'Lord, show us the Father and that will be enough for us.'

Oku_Text: Jesus fise ge: Με nè shi ghesen se əbtəm, ko se lu ne wê ke wiy me-a Filib?
English_NIV_Equivalent: Jesus answered: 'Don’t you know me, Philip, even after I have been among you such a long time?

Oku_Text: Naa nde we ab yenen me, yenmen Bay.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Anyone who has seen me has seen the Father.

Oku_Text: Ke ghan leey ge ghen ye suuy ge me din Bay se ghen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: How can you say, "Show us the Father"?

Oku_Text: Ke dine ge we báà beeme ge me lu e məm nə Bay ne Bay lu & məm nə me-a?
English_NIV_Equivalent: Don’t you believe that I am in the Father, and that the Father is in me?

Oku_Text: Gie se me foon se ghen báà se lu ken some, se lòò se Bay we ǝb luun e məm nə me ne me lu e məm nə wen, ne neeye eyfel a wen chia e me ǝbghun.
English_NIV_Equivalent: The words I say to you I do not speak on my own authority. Rather, it is the Father, living in me, who is doing his work.

Oku_Text: Ghen bééme se me ka me suuyen ge Bay lu e məm nə me ne me lu ɛ məm nə wen, buu dĩ ghen ko beeme bek eyfel yin ye me neeyen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Believe me when I say that I am in the Father and the Father is in me; or at least believe on the evidence of the works themselves.

Oku_Text: Me suuy ǝbluuy se ghen ge naa nde we ab foon eytem se me nêy ye nery əbnəə we me neeyen, neey naa we ab chian we me neeyen bek ka me se nduun se Ba a wom.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Very truly I tell you, whoever believes in me will do the works I have been doing, and they will do even greater things than these, because I am going to the Father.

Oku_Text: Ghen lon naa ghe e me eyghel é me fó se ghen ka Baye kiile eykokse chia abghun nə wan.
English_NIV_Equivalent: And I will do whatever you ask in my name, so that the Father may be glorified in the Son.

Oku_Text: Ghen bif naa ghe e me ryghel, é me neey.
English_NIV_Equivalent: You may ask me for anything in my name, and I will do it.

Oku_Text: Ghene kone me, é ghen yɛ leme nchil ə som.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'If you love me, keep my commands.

Oku_Text: Me nêy lon é Bay fő ngiamten zylee ye ey ye lu ghene ghene ǝbliy ǝbjim.
English_NIV_Equivalent: And I will ask the Father, and he will give you another advocate to help you and be with you forever—

Oku_Text: Ngiamten nê yin lu Keyioy ke ke dinen ǝbluuy.
English_NIV_Equivalent: the Spirit of truth.

Oku_Text: Lòó ghele ghé mbii jia fiisen wen bek ka ghene báà se yene wen gese ke wiy wen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: The world cannot accept him, because it neither sees him nor knows him.

Oku_Text: Dî ne ghen ke wen bek ge ǝb lu ghene ghene, ne ǝb nêy ye chii e ghene mam.
English_NIV_Equivalent: But you know him, for he lives with you and will be in you.

Oku_Text: Me jia nêy vase ghen é ghen ye lu ken se ghene ngense, me nêy kase gwiy, se ghen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: I will not leave you as orphans; I will come to you.

Oku_Text: Se moote ken le é ghele ghe mbii jia bo ye yene me ghey, dî ne ghene ye yene me, ne ka me chiin lu ne ghene ye chii sey.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Before long, the world will not see me anymore, but you will see me. Because I live, you also will live.

Oku_Text: € náà loo lu e kechii fo é ghen keele ge me lu e məm nə Ba ə wom ne ghen lu e məm nə me, ne me lu e məm nə ghen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: On that day you will realize that I am in my Father, and you are in me, and I am in you.

Oku_Text: Naa nde we ǝb keen nchil ə som leme, lu vi we ǝb konen me.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Whoever has my commands and keeps them is the one who loves me.

Oku_Text: Ba a wome nêy ye koje naa nde we ǝəbəb korgen me, ne mee me ye kone wen, è din ngen a yom se wen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: The one who loves me will be loved by my Father, and I too will love them and show myself to them.'

Oku_Text: Judas ǝblee ne wiy Iskaliot me bif ge: Báàba, lu bek ghe we wề nêy din ngerŋ ə yie se ghes è jia din se ghé mbii.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Then Judas (not Judas Iscariot) said, 'But, Lord, why do you intend to show yourself to us and not to the world?'

Oku_Text: Jesus fise ge: Naa nde we ab konen me ye nery kenǝǝ ke me suuyen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Jesus replied, 'Anyone who loves me will obey my teaching.

Oku_Text: Ba a wome ye koje wen, ne ghese Ba a wome gwiy è ye chii ghese ghene.
English_NIV_Equivalent: My Father will love them, and we will come to them and make our home with them.

Oku_Text: Naa nde we ǝb báà se koje me báà se nezy kenǝǝ ke me suuyen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Anyone who does not love me will not obey my teaching.

Oku_Text: Kenǝǝ ke ghen yionmen báà se lu kome, ke lòò se Bay we ǝb nè tumen me.
English_NIV_Equivalent: These words you hear are not my own; they belong to the Father who sent me.

Oku_Text: Me suuymen əbnəə nê vin se ghen ne me bo beɛy ghesen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'All this I have spoken while still with you.

Oku_Text: Dî ne ngiamten ye Keyioy Kelanene ke Baye nêy tum e me syghel ko nêy dinte əbnəə əbjim se ghen, è nɛɛy é ghen kuume əbnəə əbjim we me suuyenmen se ghen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: But the Advocate, the Holy Spirit, whom the Father will send in my name, will teach you all things and will remind you of everything I have said to you.

Oku_Text: Με foo eytem zyzǝǝtene se ghen, ne lu eynkii aytem ye me kiin.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Peace I leave with you; my peace I give you.

Oku_Text: Me báà se foo ne lu ye ghe mbi fene foon.
English_NIV_Equivalent: I do not give to you as the world gives.

Oku_Text: Ghàà cytem ə yene ye foo ngek se ghen, ghàà ghen ye fan.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Do not let your hearts be troubled and do not be afraid.

Oku_Text: Ghen lu ne é yiomen ka me suuyen ge, me se lòò ne me nêy kase gwiy se ghen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'You heard me say, "I am going away and I am coming back to you."

Oku_Text: Ghen kè boy se ye loote koje me fene ghen kè chekle ge me se fiile se Bay bek ge ǝb chia me.
English_NIV_Equivalent: If you loved me, you would be glad that I am going to the Father, for the Father is greater than I.

Oku_Text: Me suuy əbnəə nê vin se ghen & leenen ne ǝb nây geese gan ka ab nêy loo gan, é ghen fó zytem se me.
English_NIV_Equivalent: I have told you now before it happens, so that when it does happen you will believe.

Oku_Text: Me jia bo ye surjnen se ghen nduu se abtəm bek ge wel we ab saken mbi yin shi se gwiy.
English_NIV_Equivalent: I will not say much more to you, for the prince of this world is coming. He has no hold over me,

Oku_Text: Əb báà se ki abtaawe se nerye kenǝǝ se me, ne kooy naa ghe fene me neey ken ne lu kenəə ke Ba a wom suuyen ge me neɛy,
English_NIV_Equivalent: but he comes so that the world may learn that I love the Father and do exactly what my Father has commanded me.

Oku_Text: ka ghele mbi keele ge me kone Bay, ne me gese neey ken ne lu kii dii ke ǝb suuyen ge me ye neey Ghesen lòò se fen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Come now; let us leave.

Oku_Text: Me lu nkante ǝbtern ne ba a wom lu wel we ǝb toknen në eyleme tene.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'I am the true vine, and my Father is the gardener.

Oku_Text: əb yene ǝbtam we ab báà se koom əmtam, ab fas se me abghun.
English_NIV_Equivalent: He cuts off every branch in me that bears no fruit,

Oku_Text: Əb yene we ǝb koom əbtam, əb siyse əb ye lu kejun loote koom əmtam.
English_NIV_Equivalent: while every branch that does bear fruit he prunes so that it will be even more fruitful.

Oku_Text: Gie se me fekten se ghen nɛɛymen ghen se lu elanen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: You are already clean because of the word I have spoken to you.

Oku_Text: Ghen balen è gok se me ǝbghun, é me gok ghesen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Remain in me, as I also remain in you.

Oku_Text: Lòó ǝbtame jia koom əmtam se ngerŋ buu ge ǝb balen e abghun əbten.
English_NIV_Equivalent: No branch can bear fruit by itself; it must remain in the vine.

Oku_Text: Lu ghee-ghee ka lòó ghen jia koom əmtam buu ge ghen balen è gok e me ǝbghun.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Neither can you bear fruit unless you remain in me.

Oku_Text: Me lu ǝbten ne ghen lu cytame ten.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'I am the vine; you are the branches.

Oku_Text: Wel lòò è balen è gok se me abghun, me gok ghese wen, é ab ye koom əmtam naa se eydio, bek ge buu me é ghen jia neey kenǝǝ.
English_NIV_Equivalent: If you remain in me and I in you, you will bear much fruit; apart from me you can do nothing.

Oku_Text: Naa nde we ǝb báà balen è gok se me ǝbghun lu ka ǝbtam we é fasen, è maay, əb yum.
English_NIV_Equivalent: If you do not remain in me, you are like a branch that is thrown away and withers;

Oku_Text: É lóó é chinten eytam ka yii nê yine é me mak se ǝbvəs, ey fuo.
English_NIV_Equivalent: such branches are picked up, thrown into the fire and burned.

Oku_Text: Ghen balen è gok se me ǝbghun, gie a some gok e ghene tetem, ghene bif naa ghe ke ghene kenen é Feyine fó.
English_NIV_Equivalent: If you remain in me and my words remain in you, ask whatever you wish, and it will be done for you.

Oku_Text: Ghene loo koom amtam se eydio, Ba ǝ wom ye kiile eykokse, ne lu e jíi në ghan ye ghen luun ghon-eyfel nə me.
English_NIV_Equivalent: This is to my Father’s glory, that you bear much fruit, showing yourselves to be my disciples.

Oku_Text: Me korje ghen ken ka Baye kojen me.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'As the Father has loved me, so have I loved you.

Oku_Text: Ghen gok è ye lu ghesen ne me koje ghen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Now remain in my love.

Oku_Text: Ghen lòò è ye nerye kenaa ke me suuyen, é me ye koje ghen nduu ken e mbiy.
English_NIV_Equivalent: If you keep my commands, you will remain in my love,

Oku_Text: Lu ghee-ghee ka me nzzyen kenǝǝ ke Baye suuyen ne ǝb koje me nduu ken e mbiy.
English_NIV_Equivalent: just as I have kept my Father’s commands and remain in his love.

Oku_Text: Me suuy əbnəə vin se ghen ka kechɛkle ke ke luun e me eyteme ye lu e ghene tetem, é ghen me loote kiile kechɛkle.
English_NIV_Equivalent: I have told you this so that my joy may be in you and that your joy may be complete.

Oku_Text: Nchil ye me foon se ghen lu ge, ghen yɛ koje ngerŋ ə sen ken ka me konen ghen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: My command is this: Love each other as I have loved you.

Oku_Text: Eykon eytaa ye wel din se sunse wene báà chia ka ǝb kuo bek ghene.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Greater love has no one than this: to lay down one’s life for one’s friends.

Oku_Text: Ghene neeye kenǝǝ ke me suuyen se ghen fene ghen lu sun ə som.
English_NIV_Equivalent: You are my friends if you do what I command.

Oku_Text: Me bo tonte wiy ghen ge ghel eyfel nə me ghey bek ge wel syfele báà se ke kenǝǝ ke ba-cyfele nɛɛyen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: I no longer call you servants, because a servant does not know his master’s business.

Oku_Text: Me dì tonte ghen ge sun ə som bek ge me suuymen əbnəə əbjim se ghen we me nè yion se Ba a wom.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Instead, I have called you friends, for everything that I learned from my Father I have made known to you.

Oku_Text: Nè báà chok ghen me, nè chok me ghen è tum ge ghen ndu è ye koom əmtam naa se eydio ne lu əmtam me ǝm jia yî mey.
English_NIV_Equivalent: You did not choose me, but I chose you and appointed you so that you might go and bear fruit—fruit that will last—

Oku_Text: Ghen nɛɛy dì, è ye lon naa ghe se Bay e me eyghel, é ab fó se ghen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: and so that whatever you ask in my name the Father will give you.

Oku_Text: Kenəə ke me suuyen se ghen lu ge: Ghen ye koje ngen a sen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: This is my command: Love each other.

Oku_Text: Ghele ghé mbi loo bane ghen, ghen yɛ kuume ge ghene nè chia mbiy è se bane me.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'If the world hates you, keep in mind that it hated me first.

Oku_Text: Ghen kè boy se ye lu ghele mbi, fene ghene kè kone ghen ka ghel a ghen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: If you belonged to the world, it would love you as its own.

Oku_Text: Se lu ne me nè chok ghen & məm nə ghele mbii, ghene jia gese se lu ghele mbi; ghey kenǝǝ ke ghene banen ghen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: As it is, you do not belong to the world, but I have chosen you out of the world. That is why the world hates you.

Oku_Text: Ghen kuume kenǝǝ ke me nè suuyen se ghen ge: Wel cyfele báà se lu we ǝb chian ba-eyfel nə wen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Remember rather what I told you: "A servant is not greater than his master."

Oku_Text: É nè nəkse me, ne lu ghee-ghee ka é luun se ye nəkse ghen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: If they persecuted me, they will persecute you also.

Oku_Text: Ghene nè bóy se yio kenǝǝ ke me suuyen, é ghene ye yio sey ke ghene suuyen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: If they obeyed my teaching, they will obey yours also.

Oku_Text: Ghene nêy ye nǝkse ghen e jii ghan bek ka ghen luun ghel ə ghom, nəkse di bek ge ghene báà se ke wel we ǝb nè tumen me.
English_NIV_Equivalent: They will treat you this way because of my name, for they do not know the one who sent me.

Oku_Text: Με nè bóy se jia se gwiy se surjnen se ghene fene ghene nè báà bon njio bek mbeese ghen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: If I had not come and spoken to them, they would not be guilty of sin;

Oku_Text: Se lu & leenen ne lòó ghene jia suuy ge ghene nè báà se ke ge kenǝǝ ke ghene nè neeyen lu mbee,
English_NIV_Equivalent: but now they have no excuse for their sin.

Oku_Text: Naa nde we ǝb banen me bane sey ba a wom.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Whoever hates me hates my Father as well.

Oku_Text: Me nè bóy se jia se gwiy e ghene mam se neey əbnəə we wel nè brzy ghàà neey, fene ghene nè báà bon njio bek mbeese ghen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: If I had not done among them the works no one else did, they would not be guilty of sin.

Oku_Text: Se lu ne ghene yɛnmen əbnəə nê vin, è ko se bane me gese bane ba a wom.
English_NIV_Equivalent: As it is, they have seen these treats, and yet they have hated both me and my Father.

Oku_Text: Ke nè gan dî se lunse kenǝǝ ke é nè nyaken & ghene nwaale nchil ge: "Ghene nè bane me se lólò."
English_NIV_Equivalent: But this is to fulfill what is written in their Law: "They hated me without reason."

Oku_Text: Dî ne me nêy tum ngiamten se ghen ne lu Keyioy Kelanene në ke lòò se Bay, ne lu wen we ab dinen ǝbluuy.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'When the Advocate comes, whom I will send to you from the Father—the Spirit of truth who goes out from the Father—he will testify about me.

Oku_Text: Əb nêy gwiy è suuy kenəə ke kum me.
English_NIV_Equivalent: And you also must testify,

Oku_Text: Ghene nêy ye sunnen sey kum me bek ka ghɛsen nè shiin se eyshaa ngam.
English_NIV_Equivalent: for you have been with me from the beginning.

Oku_Text: Me suuymen əbnəə vin yene shiken.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'All this I have told you so that you will not fall away.

Oku_Text: Ghene nêy feese ghen se ngayse eyjem, ne əbliye gwiye we wele nêy ye yuye wel se ghen, əb ye kwaate ge yi neey ne lu cyfel a Feyin.
English_NIV_Equivalent: They will put you out of the synagogue; in fact, the time is coming when anyone who kills you will think they are offering a service to God.

Oku_Text: Ghene nêy ye nɛɛy əbnəə në vin se ghen bek ka ghene bɛɛy ghàà ye ke Bay kene me.
English_NIV_Equivalent: They will do such things because they have not known the Father or me.

Oku_Text: Me suuymen əbnəə vin se ghen ka əbliye nêy kwen é ghene loo nezy é ghen kuume ge me nè lô surjnen se ghen kum ǝbghene.
English_NIV_Equivalent: I have told you this, so that when their time comes you will remember that I warned you about them.

Oku_Text: Mẹ nè báà suuy əbnəə vin se ghen se eyshaa ngàm bek ka me nè bo beey ghesen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: I did not tell you this from the beginning because I was with you,

Oku_Text: Se lu ne me se nduu se wel we ǝb nè tumen me, wel se ghene chémè jia bif ge me se nduu ghááy-a?
English_NIV_Equivalent: but now I am going to him who sent me. None of you asks me, "Where are you going?"

Oku_Text: Se lu & leenen we me suuymen əbnəə nê vin se ghen, tetem a tene me se foo ngek.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Rather, you are filled with grief because I have said these things.

Oku_Text: Di ne me suuy ǝbluuy se ghen ge, ke lu kejun se ghen ge me ndu, bek ge me jia ndu, é ngiamten jia nêy gwiy se ghen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: But very truly I tell you, it is for your good that I am going away. Unless I go away, the Advocate will not come to you;

Oku_Text: Me ndu, é me me tinse wen se ghen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: but if I go, I will send him to you.

Oku_Text: ǝb nëy gwiy, è din se ghele mbii ge ghene kwaate nè cybame kum mbeese ghen, kum sychii ye titiye, kum jii ye Feyine yi sak ghel e ten.
English_NIV_Equivalent: When he comes, he will prove the world to be in the wrong about sin and righteousness and judgment:

Oku_Text: ǝb nêy din ge sykwaate a ghen kum mbee lu nè eybame bek ka ghene báà fo cytem se me,

Oku_Text: Ketuu se ghé ntaŋlee bifte əbnəə se Jesus we kum ghon-eyfel nə wen, gese nè əbnəə we ǝb dinten se ghele.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Meanwhile, the high priest questioned Jesus about his disciples and his teaching.

Oku_Text: Jesus fise ge: Me nè lóó me ye sunnen se mbi e deɛne, dinte əbnəə əbjim e ngayse cyjem gese nè se ndaa-eykokse bene fe ghele Juus ɛjime konen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'I have spoken openly to the world,' Jesus replied. 'I always taught in synagogues or at the temple, where all the Jews come together.

Oku_Text: Mẹ nè bɛɛy ghàà yɛ suuy kenǝǝ e nfik e nfik.
English_NIV_Equivalent: I said nothing in secret.

Oku_Text: Lu bek ghe we wè biften tebif tin se me?
English_NIV_Equivalent: Why question me?

Oku_Text: Yɛɛ bife se ghel ghɛ é nè yion me, ghene ke kenǝǝ ke me nè suuyen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Ask those who heard me. Surely they know what I said.'

Oku_Text: Jesus suuy dì e leghe, wel ǝblee se ghel ghe é nè chiyen ndaa-eykokse tel wen e kegiɛk, è bif ge: Ghey jii ye wè fisen ketuu se ghé ntarŋlee a ten-a?
English_NIV_Equivalent: When Jesus said this, one of the officials nearby slapped him in the face. 'Is that any way to answer the high priest?' he demanded.

Oku_Text: Jesus fise ge: Lòò è yɛ lu ge me lu ne me suuy kenǝǝ nè rybame, wὲ suuy se wel ǝbjim fen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'If I said something wrong,' Jesus replied, 'testify as to what is wrong.

Oku_Text: Yé lu we ge me suuy ne lu kenǝǝ ké titiye, é wè me tel me le-a?
English_NIV_Equivalent: But if I spoke the truth, why did you strike me?'

Oku_Text: Annas me tinse Jesus ne ǝb bo bɛɛy ǝbkulen, se Kaiafas we nè luun ketuu se ghé ntaŋlee.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Then Annas sent him bound to Caiaphas the high priest.

Oku_Text: Se lu ne Bita bo tiy fo yose əbvəs, ghel elee bif se wen ge: Wè le báà se lu sey wán-eyfel nə wel nê vin ǝblee-a?
English_NIV_Equivalent: Meanwhile, Simon Peter was still standing there warming himself. So they asked him, 'You aren’t one of his disciples too, are you?'

Oku_Text: Bita fise ge: Engan.
English_NIV_Equivalent: He denied it, saying, 'I am not.'

Oku_Text: Nè lu dì ne wel ǝblee se ghe é nè félen kekos se ketuu se ghé ntaŋlee tiy fo.
English_NIV_Equivalent: One of the high priest’s servants, a relative of the man whose ear Peter had cut off, challenged him,

Oku_Text: Əb nè lu wele ndaa nə ghe wel we Bita kè kɛfen ketuule a wen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'Didn’t I see you with him in the garden?'

Oku_Text: Kekos kii bif se Bita ge: Mẹ le kè báà yen ghene ghe Jesus e eylom-a?
English_NIV_Equivalent: Again Peter denied it,

Oku_Text: Bita gese tun, e leghe lum ngvǝǝ ton.
English_NIV_Equivalent: and at that moment a rooster began to crow.

Oku_Text: Əbtəke ney loo yio, ghé mbiye nə ghele Juuse lie Jesus se Kaiafase ndaa, è ndu so se ntok nə goveno.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Then the Jewish leaders led Jesus from Caiaphas to the palace of the Roman governor. By now it was early morning,

Oku_Text: Ghene ghe ghele Juus nè báà lii se ntok bek ka ghene nè kɛŋen se ye lu elaanen se ney se yie Kechii Eyboyse.
English_NIV_Equivalent: and to avoid ceremonial uncleanness they did not enter the palace, because they wanted to be able to eat the Passover.

Oku_Text: Bailet me fǝy è gwiy, è bif se ghene ge: Kenǝǝ ke ghene toyen wel vin se ten lu ghe?
English_NIV_Equivalent: So Pilate came out to them and asked, 'What charges are you bringing against this man?'

Oku_Text: Ghene fise ge: Əb kè boy se jia se nɛɛye kenǝǝ kebee fene ghes kè báà se gwiye në wen se wè.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'If he were not a criminal,' they replied, 'we would not have handed him over to you.'

Oku_Text: Bailet me suuy se ghene ge: Ghen se ghene ngeŋse lie wen è ndu è sak ka eysak a yene dinen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Pilate said, 'Take him yourselves and judge him by your own law.'

Oku_Text: Ghene fise ge: Ghes dì báà se ki ǝbtaawe se yuye wel.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'But we have no right to execute anyone,' they objected.

Oku_Text: Kii në kine nè gan le se nɛɛy ge kenǝǝ ke Jesus nè suuyen kum eynkii eykuo ye ǝb náà kuo kwen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: This took place to fulfill what Jesus had said about the kind of death he was going to die.

Oku_Text: Bailet kase lii e ntok è tonte Jesus è bif se wen ge: Lu wè ǝbfon ə ghele Juus-a?
English_NIV_Equivalent: Pilate then went back inside the palace, summoned Jesus and asked him, 'Are you the king of the Jews?'

Oku_Text: Jesus fise ge: Wè bif le ɛ νέeykwaate moo suuy ghel əbnəə se wè kum me-a?
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'Is that your own idea,' Jesus asked, 'or did others talk to you about me?'

Oku_Text: Bailet fise ge: Wè kwaate ge me lu wele Juus-a?
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'Am I a Jew?' Pilate replied.

Oku_Text: Ghel ghe & gwiyen nè wè se me lu ghele ghen, nè ghele mbiye se ghé ntarŋlee.
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'Your own people and chief priests handed you over to me.

Oku_Text: Kenǝǝ ke we neeyen lu ghe?
English_NIV_Equivalent: What is it you have done?'

Oku_Text: Jesus me suuy ge: Əbfon a wome báà se lu wé mbi fene.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Jesus said, 'My kingdom is not of this world.

Oku_Text: Əbfon a wome kè boy se ye lu wé mbii, fene ghel eyfel nə me kè lòó é noo ge ghàà ghé mbiye na ghele Juuse koo me.
English_NIV_Equivalent: If it were, my servants would fight to prevent my arrest by the Jewish leaders.

Oku_Text: Engan, abfon a wome báà se lu wé mbii.
English_NIV_Equivalent: But now my kingdom is from another place.'

Oku_Text: Bailet me bif ge: Ke chèmè dine ge wè lu ǝbfon-a?
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'You are a king, then!' said Pilate.

Oku_Text: Jesus fise ge: Ke lu ka wè suuyen ge me lu ǝbfon.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Jesus answered, 'You say that I am a king.

Oku_Text: É nè bii me e mbi fen bek kii nê kii, me nè gwiy se ye din əbluuy se ghele.
English_NIV_Equivalent: In fact, the reason I was born and came into the world is to testify to the truth.

Oku_Text: Naa nde we ǝb tiyen e ǝbluuy yionen se me.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Everyone on the side of truth listens to me.'

Oku_Text: Bailet bif ge: Əbluuye lu ghe?
English_NIV_Equivalent: 'What is truth?' retorted Pilate.

Oku_Text: Bailet chiase eysak ge é yúy Jesus
English_NIV_Equivalent: With this he went out again to the Jews gathered there and said, 'I find no basis for a charge against him.

Oku_Text: Bailet me kase fǝy e bey è suuy se ghele Juus ghii ge: Mẹ báà yen kejase wel vin,
English_NIV_Equivalent: But it is your custom for me to release to you one prisoner at the time of the Passover.

Oku_Text: è gese suuy ge: Ke lu & ghene nchiine ne é loo yie Kechii Eyboyse ghen lon ge me fǝyse wele nchak ǝbmok.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Do you want me to release "the king of the Jews"?'

Oku_Text: Ghene kene ge me fǝyse wel vin we luun abfon a ghele Juus-a?
English_NIV_Equivalent: They shouted back, 'No, not him!

Oku_Text: Ghene zǝǝme zəəmen ge: Engan, ghese báà se kɛŋe wen.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Give us Barabbas!'

Oku_Text: Ko fǝyse ne lu Balabbas. Balabbas nè lu ǝbchon.
English_NIV_Equivalent: Now Barabbas had taken part in an uprising.
